faqs.question: What does a dishwasher hookup involve?
faqs.answer: A dishwasher hookup includes connecting the water supply line, drain hose, and electrical wiring. We ensure proper connections to prevent leaks and keep your dishwasher running efficiently.

faqs.question: Can you install a dishwasher where there wasn't one before?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can install a dishwasher in a new location. This may require running new water supply and drain lines, as well as electrical work. We assess your kitchen layout and provide a detailed estimate.

faqs.question: How long does a dishwasher hookup take?
faqs.answer: A standard dishwasher hookup typically takes 1-2 hours. If new plumbing lines need to be run, it may take a bit longer. We give you a time estimate before starting the work.
